title: Baramati plane crash: Maharashtra CID questions VSR Ventures owner
summary: NCP (SP) MLA Rohit Pawar had alleged on March 4 that someone was trying to save VSR Ventures, and claimed that a preliminary probe by the AAIB vindicated the doubts earlier raised by him

title: MV Tax Amendment Bill passed for imposing 10% road safety cess
Government investing ₹6,000 crore in substations to meet future power demand in Andhra: Minister Gottipati
summary: The Minister said specifically in Vizianagaram district, two 220 kV power projects worth about ₹46 crore were presently under implementation

title: Revenue Department staff strike hits students, farmers: Anbumani
summary: In a statement, he said around 42,000 officials and staff of the Revenue Department had been on strike since February 24, and that the government had not taken steps to resolve the issue
